top_signals.title: NATO jet shoots down Ukrainian drone over Estonia in escalation of airspace violations
top_signals.summary: The drone was shot down by a Romanian F-16 fighter jet stationed in Šiauliai, Lithuania, Estonian media reported.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Senegal In Arrears With Arab Development Bank as Debt Woes Grow
top_signals.summary: The Arab Bank for Economic Development in Africa told investors last week that Senegal is in arrears with the lender, people familiar with the matter said, adding to signs of mounting financial strain on the government.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Milliman Financial Strategies Limited launches MGTS Milliman SmartShield Fund in UK
top_signals.summary: Funds provide investors with disciplined approach to downside protection, previously only available to insurers and institutional investors
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
